description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior features a textured gray wood finish, complemented by a smooth, darker gray top surface. The front face includes two open shelves in the center, flanked by two closed compartments with subtle, handle-less doors. The cabinet stands on four slender, angled metal legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. This piece is suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or apartment living rooms, offering both storage and display space.
description: A modern gray wood sideboard cabinet with open shelves and closed compartments, standing on slender metal legs. Its minimalist design features a textured finish and a smooth top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves in the center and two closed compartments on either side, with visible metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth and the plain, textured side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain, smooth back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain, textured panel.
